content.json:
# Virtual WAN — Flow Analysis & Top Talkers
**Theme:** vWAN traffic analysis · **Data source:** vWAN/VNet flow logs via `AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL` (Traffic Analytics); `AzureDiagnostics` fallback.

Allowed vs denied flows, top source/destination talkers, per-hub flow volume, and a cross-hub traffic matrix.

> Assumes flow logs + Traffic Analytics are enabled for the Virtual WAN. `_CL` columns are connector-dependent.

content.query: AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where SubType_s == 'FlowLog' | summarize Flows=count(), Bytes=sum(OutboundBytes_d + InboundBytes_d) by FlowStatus_s | extend Status=case(FlowStatus_s == 'A', 'Allowed', FlowStatus_s == 'D', 'Denied', FlowStatus_s) | project Status, Flows, Bytes | sort by Flows desc
content.title: Allowed vs denied flows

content.query: AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where SubType_s == 'FlowLog' | summarize Bytes=sum(OutboundBytes_d + InboundBytes_d) by SrcIP_s, DestIP_s | top 25 by Bytes desc
content.title: Top src → dest talkers by bytes

content.query: AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where SubType_s == 'FlowLog' | summarize Bytes=sum(OutboundBytes_d + InboundBytes_d) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Src1_Region_s | render timechart
content.title: Flow volume over time by region/hub

content.query: AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where SubType_s == 'FlowLog' | summarize Bytes=sum(OutboundBytes_d + InboundBytes_d) by Src1_Region_s, Dest_Region_s | sort by Bytes desc
content.title: Cross-hub / cross-region traffic matrix
